title: Stop Opening My Doors! (Copper Pressure Plate)
description: Mobs hate it, you'll love it! Stops those pesky mobs from opening your doors by adding a new pressure plate.
body:
# Stop Opening My Doors! (Copper Pressure Plate)
Have you ever entered your base to find a mischevious mob rummaging around your chests?
Have you ever had to remove your automatic door just so creepers can't get into your base?
Well boy do I have a solution!
May I introduce to you the **Copper Pressure Plate**!

### What does it do?
The Copper pressure plates act like other pressure plates, except they **only activates when a player is standing on it.** This prevents those pesky mobs from entering your base, so no more unexpected visitors can ruin your day!

There are currently **3 Variants** of the Copper Pressure Plate, with their waxed and oxidized counterparts.

### Enjoy!
